evidence.detail: Grounding backfill during the v2 migration: a304's adoption predates the artifact discipline (created 2026-04-12, no artifact, no deps). The cb-schema-v2 design record reaffirms the principle - the conflict audit it motivates is re-scoped to active directives there - so the plan stands as its stipulation artifact under the D4 grounding rule. Backfill fills empty fields only; the claim is untouched.
